summary: Completed testing of WhatsApp Bot GPT-5.2 integration. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: WhatsApp-only view (no Chat IA), 'WhatsApp Bot' title with 'EN VIVO' badge, Stats Bar with 4 KPIs, green send button, sidebar shows 'WhatsApp Bot' with Phone icon. GPT-5.2 responses are live and working correctly - generates natural Spanish responses, asks for name, extracts data via tags (LEAD_NAME, UPDATE_LEAD, STAGE). Tags are properly stripped from stored messages.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/chat/sessions returns list with source field (whatsapp/chat_ia)
Backend: GET /api/chat/whatsapp-stats returns all 4 KPIs (active_conversations_24h, avg_response_time_ms, messages_today, pending_alerts)
Backend: POST /api/webhook/whatsapp generates GPT-5.2 response (not static greeting)
Backend: Bot asks for name when new user writes first message
Backend: Lead created from WhatsApp message with source='WhatsApp'
Backend: Name extraction via LEAD_NAME tag works and updates lead
Backend: POST /api/chat/whatsapp-reply returns 404 for invalid lead_id
Backend: POST /api/chat/whatsapp-reply with valid lead sends message (or graceful fail if WhatsApp not configured)
Backend: Stored messages don't contain LEAD_NAME, UPDATE_LEAD, STAGE tags (properly stripped)
Backend: WhatsApp sessions have correct format (session_id starts with 'wa_', has lead_phone, has_alert)
Backend: Internal chat endpoint exists for backward compatibility
Frontend: Page title is 'WhatsApp Bot' with 'Monitor en tiempo real - GPT-5.2' subtitle
Frontend: 'EN VIVO' green badge present in header
Frontend: Stats Bar shows 4 KPIs (Activas 24h, Resp. Prom., Msgs Hoy, Alertas)
Frontend: No 'Nueva Conversacion' button (correct for WhatsApp-only mode)
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'WhatsApp Bot' with Phone icon
Frontend: Send button is GREEN
Frontend: Input placeholder is 'Responder como agente por WhatsApp...'
Frontend: CRM agent indicator text present below input
Frontend: Conversations list shows only WhatsApp sessions (phone numbers visible)
Frontend: No filter buttons (Todos/WhatsApp/Chat IA) - WhatsApp-only mode
seed_data_creation: Test leads created during GPT-5.2 tests with phone numbers starting with 593TEST* (auto-cleaned after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp Bot GPT-5.2 feature fully tested. Key changes from iteration 10: 1) Chat IA completely removed from ChatPage, 2) Only WhatsApp sessions displayed, 3) GPT-5.2 powers all bot responses via process_whatsapp_incoming function, 4) Tag parsing (LEAD_NAME, UPDATE_LEAD:field=value, STAGE:stage) extracts data and updates leads automatically. The bot follows a conversational flow: greet > ask name > introduce Bone Broth > qualify > close. Andrea Paredes lead (593963266566) used for manual verification. WhatsApp API may not be fully configured for actual message delivery, but the endpoint structure and response handling work correctly.
